questions.statement: A coin is tossed 250 times. We obtain a tail 115 times. On tossing the coin at random, find the probability of getting a head.&nbsp;
If&nbsp;<span class="math-tex">\(\rm x^4+\frac{1}{x^4}=47\)</span>, then find&nbsp;<span class="math-tex">\(\rm x + \frac{1}{x}\)</span>.
Two trains are running in opposite direction with the same speed. If the length of each train is 160 metres and they cross each other in 32 seconds, then what is the speed of each train?
If 70 pens and 130 pencils are to store in boxes such that each box contains same number of pens &amp; pencils of one varity only. Find the minimum numbers of boxes in which these are to store?
During sale, Raghav bought a notebook marked for ₹35 at 20% discount and a pen marked for ₹100 at 79% discount. How much (in ₹) did he save due to sale?&nbsp;
